---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: SUGGESTION
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Describe your idea**
A clear and concise description of the feature, block, item, or Backrooms area you want to see added.

**How would it work in-game?**
Explain the mechanics. How does the player interact with this feature? (e.g., "If you stand on this block, you will have less panic", "This entity chases you only when it's dark").

**Why should this be added?**
How does this improve the mod, the gameplay, or the Backrooms atmosphere?

**Visuals / Concepts**
If applicable, add any reference screenshots, drawings, or links to the specific area/entity.

**Additional context**
Add any other thoughts or details about your suggestion here.
